Reflection

How was today?

today
 great!    good average 
     11       4       1 
good 
   4

What was good about today’s lesson?

comment
We could talk freely.
Interesting
Speaking a lot
Talk very much and it was fun.
I can think about difficult questions.
I was able to exchange my opinions in English.
I could speak more smoothly.
I could think a variety of theme.
I wasable to discuss the question in detail together.
I was able to ask a lot of questions.
I can think about these topics deeper than usual.
We could discuss many academic topic and was so interesting.
I was able to have a firm opinion about the questions.
I was able to express my opinions using a wider vocabulary than last time, and I also asked questions to others.
I was able to actively participate in the discussion.
Participants have good opinions.
comment
I could explain about myself during discussion. I also react my friends opinion!
Everyone’s topic.
I was able to talk more than last week.
There are some serious questions that we should talk about more

What was not so good?

comment
We sometimes used Japanese.
I can’t express what I said well, so I sometimes use Japanese.
Sometime useing Japanese
We can’t remember English words sometimes.
I can’t talk difficult topic in English soon.
There was a little time of silence.
I sometimes use Japanese when I don’t know the words.
I could not speak big voice.
I couldn’t speak actively.
I ended up saying it in Japanese without looking up the words I didn’t understand.
I can not tell my opinions to other classmates in English.
nothing
I couldn’t speak immediately my opinions with right sentence.
There were times when I couldn’t remember difficult words like “tuition fees” and ended up speaking in Japanese.
I didn’t know the technical terms.
I often talked with group members in Japanese
comment
I couldn’t say strong opinions. So I want to get some knowledge about everything.
Too long.
There were a lot of irrelevant topics.
My stomach hurt
